generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms, but about protecting them. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the last major incident - that's only possible with the right tools. Civil liberties advocates often worry, but in practice, these measures have kept us safe without overreach. It's our responsibility to support the systems that protect our way of life. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
